extension.summary: Per-folder Kodi setting overrides via override.ini.
extension.description: Opt-in service addon for the p3i CoreELEC build. When a video plays, looks for an "override.ini" file in the same folder and applies the listed Kodi setting overrides at AV-start; restores the previous values on stop. Format is one "kodi.setting.id = value" per line. Defers automatically when PlexMod4Kodi (script.plexmod) is running. If service.p3i.sb is installed it owns coreelec.amlogic.dolbyvision.audio.seamlessbranch and override.ini entries for that key are skipped to avoid a write race.
